title: Custom Paintings
description: A fully server side mod to get custom paintings.
body:
# Custom Paintings
The ability to add any image you desire.

Use the command `/painting <url> [blocksX] [blocksY]` to recieve a map with the image at the url or optionally more maps to form a larger image (specified in the blocksX and blocksY).

Fully server-side, no client installation needed (unless you want it in singleplayer).
